journey: Self-serve signup to activation (first successful report shared)

sources.notes: Signup -> verify -> create workspace -> connect data -> first report -> share. Mobile web not instrumented.
2,340 tickets tagged onboarding or getting-started, anonymized.
Notes from 38 recorded onboarding sessions, written by two researchers.
Themes from 12 activation interviews, Q1 research round.

known_gaps: No data on users who bounced before creating an account
